sentences.target: Ich habe mein Billett zu Hause vergessen.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈhaːbə maɪ̯n bɪlˈjɛt tsuː ˈhaʊ̯zə fɛɐ̯ˈɡɛsn̩/

translations.de: Ich habe mein Billett zu Hause vergessen.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈhaːbə maɪ̯n bɪlˈjɛt tsuː ˈhaʊ̯zə fɛɐ̯ˈɡɛsn̩/
translations.en: I forgot my ticket at home.
translations.es: Me dejé el billete en casa.
translations.fr: J'ai oublié mon billet à la maison.
translations.it: Ho dimenticato il biglietto a casa.
translations.vi: Tôi để quên vé ở nhà.
translations.nl: Ik ben mijn kaartje thuis vergeten.
translations.hi: मैं टिकट घर पर भूल गया।

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular, nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite auxiliary (present, 1st sg) forming the present perfect with the past participle.
Possessive determiner; agrees with the noun in case/number/gender (here accusative neuter singular).
Common noun, neuter, singular; direct object (Swiss usage for ‘ticket’).
Preposition; part of the fixed adverbial expression ‘zu Hause’ (‘at home’).
Lexicalized form in the set phrase ‘zu Hause’; functions adverbially (‘at home’).
Past participle of the main verb; complements the auxiliary to form the present perfect.

sentences.target: Er zeigt sein Billett am Eingang.

translations.de: Er zeigt sein Billett am Eingang.
translations.en: He shows his ticket at the entrance.
translations.es: Él muestra su entrada en la puerta.
translations.fr: Il montre son billet à l'entrée.
translations.zh-Hans: 他在入口出示他的门票。
translations.pt: Ele mostra o bilhete à entrada.
translations.vi: Anh ấy trình vé ở cổng.
translations.nl: Hij laat zijn kaartje bij de ingang zien.
translations.uk: Він показує свій квиток на вході.
translations.hi: वह प्रवेश पर अपना टिकट दिखाता है।
translations.el: Δείχνει το εισιτήριό του στην είσοδο.
translations.id: Dia menunjukkan tiketnya di pintu masuk.
translations.ro: El își arată biletul la intrare.
translations.da: Han viser sin billet ved indgangen.
translations.ja: 彼は入口でチケットを見せる。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular, nominative; subject.
Finite main verb, present, 3rd singular; transitive ‘to show’.
Possessive determiner; marks the possessor and agrees with the noun (accusative neuter singular).
Common noun, neuter, singular; direct object.
Fused form of ‘an dem’ (preposition + definite article); governs dative in a locative PP.
Common noun, masculine, singular, dative as object of the preposition.

sentences.target: Sie hat das Billett schon online gekauft.
sentences.reading: /ziː hat das bɪlˈjɛt ʃoːn ˈɔnlaɪ̯n ɡəˈkaʊ̯ft/

translations.de: Sie hat das Billett schon online gekauft.
translations.ipa: /ziː hat das bɪlˈjɛt ʃoːn ˈɔnlaɪ̯n ɡəˈkaʊ̯ft/
translations.en: She already bought the ticket online.
translations.es: Ella ya compró el billete por internet.
translations.fr: Elle a déjà acheté son billet en ligne.
translations.it: Ha già comprato il biglietto online.
translations.zh-Hans: 她已经在网上买好了票。
translations.yue: 佢已經喺網上買好咗張票。
translations.pt: Ela já comprou o bilhete online.
translations.he: היא כבר קנתה את הכרטיס אונליין.
translations.vi: Cô ấy đã mua vé online rồi.
translations.nl: Ze heeft het kaartje al online gekocht.
translations.hi: वह टिकट ऑनलाइन पहले ही खरीद चुकी है।
translations.el: Έχει ήδη αγοράσει το εισιτήριο διαδικτυακά.
translations.nb: Hun har allerede kjøpt billetten på nettet.
translations.sv: Hon har redan köpt biljetten online.
translations.ro: Ea a cumpărat deja biletul online.
translations.da: Hun har allerede købt billetten online.
translations.fi: Hän on jo ostanut lipun netistä.
translations.ja: 彼女はもうオンラインでチケットを買った。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular, nominative; subject.
Finite auxiliary (present, 3rd sg) forming the present perfect.
Definite article; accusative neuter singular agreeing with ‘Billett’.
Common noun, neuter, singular; direct object.
Temporal adverb modifying the verb phrase (‘already’).
Adverb of manner; indicates the purchase was made online.
Past participle of the main verb; complements the auxiliary to form the present perfect.

sentences.target: Wir brauchen noch ein Billett für dich.
sentences.reading: /viːɐ̯ ˈbʁaʊ̯xn̩ nɔx aɪ̯n bɪlˈjɛt fyːɐ̯ dɪç/

translations.de: Wir brauchen noch ein Billett für dich.
translations.ipa: /viːɐ̯ ˈbʁaʊ̯xn̩ nɔx aɪ̯n bɪlˈjɛt fyːɐ̯ dɪç/
translations.en: We still need a ticket for you.
translations.es: Aún tenemos que comprar un billete para ti.
translations.fr: Nous devons encore t'acheter un billet.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们还得给你买一张票。
translations.yue: 我哋仲要幫你買一張票。
translations.ru: Нам ещё нужно купить тебе билет.
translations.pt: Ainda precisamos de comprar um bilhete para ti.
translations.he: אנחנו עדיין צריכים לקנות לך כרטיס.
translations.tr: Senin için hâlâ bir bilet almamız gerek.
translations.vi: Chúng ta vẫn cần mua vé cho bạn.
translations.ar: ما زلنا بحاجة إلى شراء تذكرة لك.
translations.nl: We moeten voor jou nog een kaartje kopen.
translations.uk: Нам ще треба купити тобі квиток.
translations.hu: Még vennünk kell neked egy jegyet.
translations.hi: हमें तुम्हारे लिए अभी एक टिकट खरीदना है।
translations.el: Πρέπει ακόμα να σου αγοράσουμε ένα εισιτήριο.
translations.nb: Vi må fortsatt kjøpe en billett til deg.
translations.id: Kita masih perlu membeli tiket untukmu.
translations.sv: Vi måste fortfarande köpa en biljett till dig.
translations.ro: Încă trebuie să-ți cumpărăm un bilet.
translations.da: Vi skal stadig købe en billet til dig.
translations.fi: Meidän pitää vielä ostaa sinulle lippu.
translations.ja: 君の分の切符をまだ買う必要がある。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural, nominative; subject.
Finite main verb, present, 1st plural; takes an accusative object.
Adverb indicating addition/continuation (‘still/another’ in context).
Indefinite article; accusative neuter singular agreeing with ‘Billett’.
Common noun, neuter, singular; direct object.
Preposition governing the accusative; introduces a beneficiary phrase.
Personal pronoun, 2nd person singular, accusative; object of the preposition.

es: Me dejé el billete en casa.
Él muestra su entrada en la puerta.
Ella ya compró el billete por internet.
Aún tenemos que comprar un billete para ti.

Il montre son billet à l'entrée.
Elle a déjà acheté son billet en ligne.
Nous devons encore t'acheter un billet.
